topics: convection and radiation heat transfer. Mathematical description of fluid flow and heat transfer
energy and chemical species in Cartesian and cylindrical coordinates. Classification of Partial differential equations - elliptic
parabolic and hyperbolic equations. Initial and boundary conditions
Finite difference form of PDE equations-Taylor’s series approach. Central difference
and forward difference of first and second order derivatives. Solution of Laplace equation (conduction problems) using finite difference equations. Discretization error
Solution of unsteady conduction equation using finite difference method
implicit methods. Stability of numerical solutions. Solution of linear algebraic equations
direct methods and indirect methods. Point by point iterations, Tri diagonal matrix method (TDMA
Introduction to Finite volume method. Solution of one
dimensional steady state conduction problems. Handling different boundary conditions. Solution of one
dimensional convection diffusion problems using central difference schemes and upwind scheme. Introduction to SIMPLE algorithm for incompressible flows
